generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for object detection and environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoLidarRawData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for object detection and environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDepthCameraRawData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed sensor measuring ego vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering angle sensor measuring vehicle steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

instance HokuyoLidarRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance IntelDepthCameraRawData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance DBSCANPointCloudClusters : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered LiDAR point cloud data from DBSCAN processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoLidarRawData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks generated by Kalman filter processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DBSCANPointCloudClusters
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleDataInstance : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DBSCANProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo KalmanFilterEnabler
]

instance ACCControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic for lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration and development"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService, ACCDecisionService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 middleware for real-time communication between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python38 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for scripting and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance Cpp : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for high-performance computing components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCDecisionService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex system modeling and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCDecisionService
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance DBSCANProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "DBSCAN processing enabler for point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance KalmanFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Kalman filter enabler for object tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ACC control logic enabler for speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCDecisionService
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state"
]

instance ObjectTrackReport : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reports on detected object tracks from sensor data"
]

instance SystemPerformanceDiagnostics : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System performance diagnostics for monitoring and analysis"
]

instance VehicleState3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ACCDecisionLogic : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "ACC decision logic for lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RemoteControlInterface : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Remote control interface for vehicle management"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data monitoring for vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTrackReport
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "3D visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleState3DVisualization
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated report generation for system diagnostics"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemPerformanceDiagnostics
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote management via user interface"
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlInterface
]

instance ACCDecisionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "ACC decision service for lead vehicle detection and speed adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionLogic
]

instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor actuator controlled by Actuation FE for speed adjustment"
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo actuator controlled by Steering Servo Actuation FE for steering angle adjustment"
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Actuation Functional Entity converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance SteeringServoActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Steering Servo Actuation Functional Entity for steering angle control"
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano compute unit for processing sensor data"
]

instance VedderSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller for motor control"
]

instance JetsonNXAntenna : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX antenna for wireless communication"
]

instance AutonomousVehicleSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted onto Traxxas Slash 4x4 Premium teleoperated vehicle"
    base:contains JetsonOrinNano, JetsonNXAntenna, HokuyoUST10LX, IntelDeepsenseD435i, VedderSpeedController, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, ActuationFE, SteeringServoActuationFE, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals including ACC enable/disable commands, desired speed adjustments, and emergency braking commands transmitted from DT to PT for vehicle actuation."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time operation with ≤100 ms end-to-end latency and clock synchronization accuracy, as per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Structured into Physical Twin Entity (on-vehicle), Digital Twin Entity (processing), and User Entity (UI), communicating via ROS2 internally and Wi-Fi externally."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Used during both design phase (cyber-physical experimentation, validation) and operational phase (monitoring, optimization, remote management) of the vehicle lifecycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Simplified to Performance Class I ACC (no road curvature) for 1/10th-scale vehicle; safety-critical compliance with ISO 15622; limited fidelity due to scale constraints."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 for intra-entity communication; Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication; ≤100 ms latency per 3GPP TS 22.185."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity on vehicle (Jetson devices); Digital Twin and User Entities potentially deployed in cloud or remote servers for computation offloading."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 for reference architecture; ISO 15622 for ACC functionality specifications."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety-critical requirements include ≤100 ms latency and clock synchronization for real-time operation; no explicit cybersecurity measures detailed in document."
]
